allow: PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i=1; $i -le 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "attempt=$i status=$\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)"; $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { "HEALTH_FAILED after 30 attempts"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\META M\\Desktop\\프롬프트 튜닝\\_server_logs\\server_v2_20260419_100711.stderr.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 40 })

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i=1; $i -le 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "attempt=$i status=$\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)"; $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "HEALTH_FAILED after 30 attempts"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\META M\\Desktop\\프롬프트 튜닝\\_server_logs\\server_v2_20260419_100711.stderr.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 40 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8100/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) body=$\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "err=$_" })
PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -ne $PID -and $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | Select-Object Id, StartTime, CPU, WS | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Id\) CPU=$\($_.CPU\) WS=$\($_.WS\)" })
PowerShell($procs = Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("pid=" + $_.Id\) } } else { Write-Output "no_python" })

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process pwsh,powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \("pid=" + $_.Id + " name=" + $_.ProcessName + " CPU=" + $_.CPU\) } } else { Write-Output "none" })
PowerShell(Get-Process python | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-20\) } | Select-Object Id, StartTime, CPU | Format-Table)
